ModelPackageArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new model package.

ArtifactArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the artifact.

DestinationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the destination.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the SageMaker resource.

TrialComponentArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the trial component.

TrialArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the trial.

ClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of your SageMaker HyperPod cluster where the volume attachment operation was performed.

NodeId.description: The unique identifier of the cluster node where your volume was attached.

VolumeId.description: The unique identifier of your EBS volume that was attached.

AttachTime.description: The timestamp when the volume attachment operation was initiated by the SageMaker HyperPod service.

Status.description: The current status of your volume attachment operation.

DeviceName.description: The device name assigned to your attached volume on the target instance.

Successful.description: A list of NodeLogicalIDs that were successfully added to the cluster. The NodeLogicalID is unique per cluster and does not change between instance replacements. Each entry includes a NodeLogicalId that can be used to track the node's provisioning status (with DescribeClusterNode), the instance group name, and the current status of the node.

Failed.description: A list of errors that occurred during the node addition operation. Each entry includes the instance group name, error code, number of failed additions, and an error message.
A list of errors encountered when deleting the specified nodes.

Successful.description: A list of node IDs that were successfully deleted from the specified cluster.

FailedNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of NodeLogicalIds that could not be deleted, along with error information explaining why the deletion failed.

SuccessfulNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of NodeLogicalIds that were successfully deleted from the cluster.

ModelPackageSummaries.description: The summaries for the model package versions

BatchDescribeModelPackageErrorMap.description: A map of the resource and BatchDescribeModelPackageError objects reporting the error associated with describing the model package.

Successful.description: A list of EC2 instance IDs for which the reboot operation was successfully initiated.

Failed.description: A list of errors encountered for EC2 instance IDs that could not be rebooted. Each error includes the instance ID, an error code, and a descriptive message.

FailedNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of errors encountered for logical node IDs that could not be rebooted. Each error includes the logical node ID, an error code, and a descriptive message. This field is only present when NodeLogicalIds were provided in the request.

SuccessfulNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of logical node IDs for which the reboot operation was successfully initiated. This field is only present when NodeLogicalIds were provided in the request.

Successful.description: A list of EC2 instance IDs for which the replacement operation was successfully initiated.

Failed.description: A list of errors encountered for EC2 instance IDs that could not be replaced. Each error includes the instance ID, an error code, and a descriptive message.

FailedNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of errors encountered for logical node IDs that could not be replaced. Each error includes the logical node ID, an error code, and a descriptive message. This field is only present when NodeLogicalIds were provided in the request.

SuccessfulNodeLogicalIds.description: A list of logical node IDs for which the replacement operation was successfully initiated. This field is only present when NodeLogicalIds were provided in the request.

ActionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the action.

AlgorithmArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new algorithm.

AppArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the app.

ArtifactArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the artifact.

AutoMLJobArn.description: The unique ARN assigned to the AutoML job when it is created.
The unique ARN assigned to the AutoMLJob when it is created.

ClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

CodeRepositoryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new repository.

  • CompilationJobArn: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the compiled job.

EndpointConfigArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the endpoint configuration.

FlowDefinitionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow definition you create.

HubArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the hub.

AuthorizedUrlConfigs.description: An array of authorized URL configurations, each containing a presigned URL and its corresponding local file path for proper file organization during download.

NextToken.description: A token for pagination. If present, indicates that more presigned URLs are available. Use this token in a subsequent request to retrieve additional URLs.

HubArn.description: The ARN of the hub that the hub content reference was added to.

HumanTaskUiArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the human review workflow user interface you create.

HyperParameterTuningJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the tuning job. SageMaker assigns an ARN to a hyperparameter tuning job when you create it.

InferenceComponentArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the inference component.

JobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the recommendation job.

LabelingJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the labeling job. You use this ARN to identify the labeling job.

ModelArn.description: The ARN of the model created in SageMaker.

JobDefinitionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model bias job.

ModelCardArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the successfully created model card.

OptimizationJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the optimization job.

Arn.description: The ARN of the SageMaker Partner AI App.

Url.description: The presigned URL that you can use to access the SageMaker Partner AI App.

StudioLifecycleConfigArn.description: The ARN of your created Lifecycle Configuration.

TransformJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transform job.

Workforce.description: A single private workforce. You can create one private work force in each Amazon Web Services Region. By default, any workforce-related API operation used in a specific region will apply to the workforce created in that region. To learn how to create a private workforce, see Create a Private Workforce.

Workteam.description: A Workteam object that describes the updated work team.
